# KaBOOM MCP

> KaBOOM MCP is an open-source browser extension + MCP server that streams real-time browser telemetry (console logs, network errors, exceptions, WebSocket events) to AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Zed, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Antigravity. Zero dependencies. Localhost only. Enterprise safe. Install: `npx kaboom-agentic-browser@latest`

## Getting Started
- [Quick Start](https://gokaboom.dev/getting-started/): Install and configure KaBOOM in under 2 minutes
- [Features](https://gokaboom.dev/features/): Everything KaBOOM captures — logs, network, WebSocket, DOM, Web Vitals, test generation

## MCP Integration
- [Overview](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/): Connect KaBOOM to any MCP-compatible AI tool
- [Claude Code](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/claude-code/): Configure for Claude Code
- [Cursor](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/cursor/): Configure for Cursor IDE
- [Windsurf](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/windsurf/): Configure for Windsurf (Codeium)
- [Claude Desktop](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/claude-desktop/): Configure for Claude Desktop
- [Zed](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/zed/): Configure for Zed editor
- [Gemini CLI](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/gemini/): Configure for Gemini CLI
- [OpenCode](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/opencode/): Configure for OpenCode
- [Antigravity](https://gokaboom.dev/mcp-integration/antigravity/): Configure for Google Antigravity

## Capabilities
- [Test Generation](https://gokaboom.dev/generate-test/): Generate Playwright regression tests from real browser sessions
- [WebSocket Monitoring](https://gokaboom.dev/websocket-monitoring/): Monitor WebSocket connections and messages
- [Network Bodies](https://gokaboom.dev/network-bodies/): Capture HTTP request and response bodies
- [DOM Queries](https://gokaboom.dev/dom-queries/): Query the live DOM with CSS selectors via MCP

## Reference
- [Security](https://gokaboom.dev/security/): Enterprise security — credential redaction, localhost-only, zero dependencies
- [Alternatives](https://gokaboom.dev/alternatives/): Compare KaBOOM with Chrome DevTools MCP, BrowserTools MCP, Cursor MCP Extension

## Blog
- [MCP Browser Debugging Tools Compared (2025)](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/mcp-browser-debugging-tools-compared/): Practical comparison of KaBOOM MCP, Chrome DevTools MCP, BrowserTools MCP, and Cursor MCP Extension
- [How to Debug Browser Errors with Claude Code Using MCP](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/debug-browser-errors-claude-code-mcp/): Give Claude Code real-time access to browser console logs, network errors, and exceptions
- [How to Give Cursor Access to Browser Console Logs](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/give-cursor-access-to-browser-console-logs/): Connect Cursor IDE to your browser with KaBOOM MCP
- [How to Generate Playwright Tests from Real Browser Sessions](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/generate-playwright-tests-from-browser-sessions/): Record browser interactions and generate Playwright regression tests automatically
- [Why document.body.innerHTML Ruins LLM Context Windows](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/why-innerhtml-ruins-llm-context-windows/): Why raw HTML wastes LLM tokens and how KaBOOM MCP sends structured data instead
- [Zero-Dependency MCP Setup: Browser Debugging Without Node.js](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/zero-dependency-mcp-browser-debugging/): Single Go binary with zero runtime dependencies for browser observability
- [KaBOOM MCP vs Chrome DevTools MCP](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/kaboom-agentic-browser-vs-chrome-devtools-mcp/): Detailed comparison — architecture, features, security, and performance
- [KaBOOM MCP vs BrowserTools MCP](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/kaboom-agentic-browser-vs-browsertools-mcp/): Comparison — architecture, features, dependencies, and privacy
- [KaBOOM MCP vs Cursor MCP Extension](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/kaboom-agentic-browser-vs-cursor-mcp-extension/): Which should Cursor users choose?
- [How to Monitor WebSocket Connections with AI Coding Assistants](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/monitor-websockets-with-ai-coding-assistants/): The only MCP browser tool that captures WebSocket connections and messages
- [Technical Deep Dive: Why Cook With KaBOOM MCP?](https://gokaboom.dev/blog/technical-deep-dive-why-kaboom/): How KaBOOM MCP solves LLM browser automation from accessibility trees to console vision
